diagram_title: Subagent quota safety gate + observation tools

activities.label: Spawn subagent with task-tool source marker
activities.description: Task tool 建立新 subsession 時在 session.info 標 source='task-tool' + parentSessionID

activities.label: Subagent executes tool-call round
activities.description: Subagent LLM 吐 tool_use → runtime 執行 → tool_result 回給 LLM
outputs: Completed tool-call entry in session messages

activities.label: Pre-dispatch quota gate check
activities.description: 下一筆 provider request 發出前，runtime 判斷是否 task-tool subagent、gate 是否啟用、呼叫 probe 拿剩餘 %
controls: DD-14: probe 不可用則放行 + WARN

activities.label: Probe quota via AccountQuotaProbe registry
activities.description: 讀 quota-cache.json；stale 時 fetch live API 寫回；失敗則回 probe-failed

activities.label: Cancel subagent with quota-gate-trip reason
activities.description: Runtime 呼叫 cancel(session, reason='quota-gate-trip')；subagent runloop 結束、不再發 request
controls: Prerequisite: fix prompt.ts:390-403 manual_interrupt override bug

activities.label: Generate structured trip summary
activities.description: Runtime 機械掃 subagent 的 messages / SharedContext / TodoWrite state，產 StructuredSummary

activities.label: Return TaskResult (tripped=true) to parent
activities.description: Task tool 把 {tripped, reason, summary, sharedContext} 組成 tool_result 回 parent LLM

activities.label: Observation tool self-check (supporting)
activities.description: 任何 session 呼叫 get_my_current_usage，bridge 注入 sessionID，tool 回 UsagePayload + 新鮮度
mechanisms: MCP bridge + system-manager tool + quota-probe registry

activities.label: Main handler — pick healthiest candidate account
activities.description: gate trip on main session → 選同 family 內 best-available 帳號（排除 self、cooldown、probe-fail）

activities.label: Main handler — unpin + re-pin with override
Main handler — emit banner to UI
activities.description: Bus event 送到 SSE；前端 render non-blocking system notice
mechanisms: session bus + SSE + frontend notice component

activities.label: Main handler — hard-stop fallback
activities.description: 候選為空 / cooldown / 全 probe 失敗 → 插入 assistant hard-stop message + finishReason
controls: DD-23: 走 natural finish 而非 cancel
